content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Super Egg Drop". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
content.inputFormat: The function takes two parameters: eggs (the number of eggs) and floors (the number of floors in the building).
content.outputFormat: The function returns the minimum number of moves to find the highest floor from which an egg can be dropped without breaking.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to build up a table of minimum moves for each number of eggs and floors.
